    THE PLAN
    Five days. One epic trip. 🎉
    Day 1 — We Land in Vegas!
    Fri · Jul 3
    South Strip · Easy Day
    • 8:00✈️Fly into Vegas — limo ride to the hotel!
    • 9:30🥞Big group breakfast
    • 12:30🌮Welcome lunch at Border Grill
    • 2:00📸Photo at the giant Welcome to Las Vegas sign
    • 3:00🌊First splash at Mandalay Beach pool
    • 6:30🍽️Family dinner
    • 8:00😴Wind down — huge day tomorrow
    Day 2 — Rides + Sphere + Fireworks⭐ BIG DAY
    Sat · Jul 4
    Big Day · July 4th
    • 8:00🥞Breakfast at the Peppermill
    • 11:00🎢ADVENTUREDOME — indoor rollercoasters!
    • 1:30🍕Lunch at Circus Circus
    • 2:30❄️Cool-down break at the hotel
    • 5:00🌀Wizard of Oz at THE SPHERE
    • 6:30🥤Black Tap CrazyShakes!
    • 7:15🍝Dinner at the Venetian
    • 9:00🎆JULY 4th FIREWORKS!
    Day 3 — Big Pool Day⭐ BIG DAY
    Sun · Jul 5
    South Strip · Mandalay Bay
    • 9:00🥞Slow breakfast
    • 10:30🌊Wave pool + lazy river ALL DAY
    • 12:30🍔Pool lunch at Beach Bar & Grill
    • 3:00☀️More pool / cool-down rotation
    • 7:00🍕Dinner — Slice of Vegas
    • 8:30🦈Optional: Shark Reef Aquarium
    Day 4 — Omega Mart + MJ ONE
    Mon · Jul 6
    Off-Strip → Hotel
    • 9:00🥞Easy breakfast
    • 11:30🛒OMEGA MART at Area15 — the weirdest store ever
    • 2:00🍴Lunch at Area15
    • 3:00🕹️Area15 arcade + add-ons
    • 4:30🛟Pool / nap break
    • 7:00🕺MICHAEL JACKSON ONE by Cirque du Soleil
    • 8:45😴Show ends — bedtime
    Day 5 — Last Splash
    Tue · Jul 7
    South Strip · Mandalay Bay
    • 8:00🥞Breakfast
    • 10:00🌊One more pool day!
    • 12:00🥗Farewell lunch by the pool
    • 3:30🦈Optional: Shark Reef
    • 7:00🍽️Last family dinner
    ADVENTURES
    Five missions. Zero excuses. Let's go.
    INDOOR THEME PARK
    ADVENTUREDOME
    Coasters and rides under a giant pink dome. AC blasting. Ride everything.
    WHERECircus Circus
    VIBECoasters + Rides
    RATING🎢🎢🎢🎢🎢
    RATE IT
    ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
    The only rule? Ride everything twice.
    THE GIANT GLOWING BALL
    THE SPHERE
    The biggest screen ever built. Wizard of Oz wrapped all the way around you.
    WHATWizard of Oz
    SIZE16,000 seats
    RATING🤯🤯🤯🤯🤯
    RATE IT
    ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
    You are not in Kansas anymore.
    ENTER THE WEIRD
    OMEGA MART
    A grocery store that broke the rules of reality. Secret doors. Neon everything.
    WHEREArea15
    VIBENeon + Weird
    RATING🎨🎨🎨🎨🎨
    RATE IT
    ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
    Walk in. Get mind-blown. Walk out a legend.
    SHOWTIME
    MJ ONE
    Michael Jackson + Cirque du Soleil acrobats + pyro. Not a normal show.
    WHEREMandalay Bay
    RUNTIME90 min
    RATING🕺🕺🕺🕺🕺
    RATE IT
    ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
    Front row to a whole other world.
    WATER WORLD
    THE POOL
    Wave pool, lazy river, and a real sand beach. Three whole pool days.
    WHEREMandalay Bay
    VIBEWaves + River
    RATING🌊🌊🌊🌊🌊
    RATE IT
    ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
    Eleven pools, a lazy river, and a wave pool. This is the dream.
    THE FOOD
    Fuel up the fun way. 😋
    BLACK TAP CRAZYSHAKES
    A milkshake with an entire dessert stacked on top. This is real.
    COTTON CANDY ICE CREAM BURRITO
    Rainbow cotton candy wrapped around ice cream, Oreos, and M&Ms.
    🏖️
    BEACH BAR & GRILL
    Burgers and shakes with your feet still wet from the wave pool.
    🏆

    THE CHAMPION'S CODE
    Five rules. No exceptions.
    1
    Hydrate or die-drate. 106°F in Vegas. Water first. Always.
    2
    Sunscreen is armor. Champions protect themselves.
    3
    Stick with the crew. If you wander, the adventure pauses.
    4
    Try everything once. Food, rides, experiences. Be brave.
    5
    This is YOUR trip. Have the best time of your life.
    ★ LEVI THE CHAMPION ★

    IN VEGAS
    JULY 3 – 7, 2026 · LAS VEGAS, NV
